scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @developer-landing/shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @developer-landing/shared && npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server
scripts.test: npm run test -w @developer-landing/shared && npm run test -w client && npm run test -w server
